domain_context.inferred_domain: interstellar passenger transport (synthetic Kaggle Spaceship Titanic, binary classification)

column_semantics.PassengerId: Unique passenger id encoded gggg_pp where gggg is the travel-group number and pp is the index within the group; shared gggg means people travel together.
column_semantics.HomePlanet: Departure planet (Earth, Europa, or Mars) reflecting origin population and socioeconomic profile.
column_semantics.CryoSleep: Whether the passenger elected suspended animation, which confines them to their cabin for the voyage.
column_semantics.Cabin: Cabin assignment in deck/num/side format; deck is a letter A-G or T, num is the cabin number, side is P (Port) or S (Starboard).
column_semantics.Destination: Destination planet (TRAPPIST-1e, PSO J318.5-22, or 55 Cancri e).
column_semantics.VIP: Whether the passenger paid for premium VIP service.
column_semantics.RoomService: Amount billed at the ship room-service amenity.
column_semantics.FoodCourt: Amount billed at the ship food court amenity.
column_semantics.ShoppingMall: Amount billed at the ship shopping mall amenity.
column_semantics.Spa: Amount billed at the ship spa amenity.
column_semantics.VRDeck: Amount billed at the ship virtual-reality deck amenity.
column_semantics.Name: Passenger first and last name; surname tends to be shared within a travel group/family.
column_semantics.Transported: Target boolean: whether the passenger was transported to an alternate dimension by the spacetime anomaly.

known_relationships: PassengerId encodes group as gggg_pp; passengers sharing gggg travel together and tend to share Cabin, HomePlanet, Destination and surname, with correlated Transported outcomes.
Cabin decomposes into deck/num/side; deck and side carry signal because the anomaly effect varies by physical location.
CryoSleep passengers are confined to cabins so they have zero spend across all five amenity columns, and CryoSleep is strongly predictive of Transported.
The five spending columns are amenity bills; their sum gives total spend, and zero total spend co-occurs with CryoSleep=True.
HomePlanet correlates with deck and with spending level; Europa passengers concentrate on upper decks and spend more.
HomePlanet and Destination interact with transport probability.
Age interacts with outcome and spending; children spend little and have a distinct transport rate.
Surname extracted from Name clusters with group membership and recovers group ties.
leakage_risks: Group-based aggregates can leak the target if built from the row's own label or test rows; group features must be derived in a train-only, leave-one-out fashion.
